message:
feat(app): Integrate desktop UI components with dashboard layout

Integrates the new ActionToolbar, AnalysisSidebar, and QuickStats components
into the main application with responsive behavior.

Layout integration:
- Added BREAKPOINT_WIDE_PX constant (1400px) for sidebar visibility
- New isWide layout state tracked via matchMedia listener
- Dashboard layout wrapper with conditional sidebar class
- ActionToolbar renders above main content on non-mobile devices
- QuickStats bar shows when a phage is selected (all devices)
- AnalysisSidebar appears on wide screens with collapse toggle

State management:
- analysisSidebarCollapsed state for sidebar visibility
- getLayoutSnapshot updated to include isWide boolean
- MediaQueryList listener for BREAKPOINT_WIDE_PX

Dynamic sizing:
- sequenceHeight now uses clamp(500px, 70vh, 1000px) on desktop
- geneMapHeight scales based on viewport width:
  - 2560px+: 100px
  - 1920px+: 85px
  - 1440px+: 75px
  - Default: 65px
- GeneMapCanvas receives dynamic height prop

Toolbar callbacks:
- onOpenSearch -> 'search' overlay
- onOpenAnalysis -> 'analysisMenu' overlay (corrected from 'analysis')
- onOpenComparison -> 'comparison' overlay
- onOpenSettings -> 'settings' overlay
- onOpenHelp -> 'help' overlay
- onOpenCommandPalette -> 'commandPalette' overlay

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
